raw.official description: Secondary fire hits slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds.
Primary fire’s range is increased by 30%.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Deep_Freeze.png|sub|link=Mei#Deep Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Deep Freeze|Deep Freeze]] in Season 16.

raw.official description: Cryo-Freeze slows and deals 70 damage per second to nearby enemies.
Deal continuous damage with primary fire to significantly slow an enemy. Secondary fire deals additional damage to affected enemies.
raw.ability details:
* Introduced in [[June 13, 2023 Patch|Season 5]] and removed at the start of [[October 10, 2023 Patch|Season 7]] of ''[[Overwatch 2]]''. 
* Deep Chill builds up after 26 continuous hits from Endothermic Blaster.
** Further hits do not extend the duration of the effect. Deep Chill starts building up again from nothing once it ends.
* Deep Chill can also be triggered by hitting the target with [[Quick Melee]].
* The damage is dealt in a separate instance after the damage from secondary fire's projectile/melee, and it cannot [[critical hit]].

raw.official description: Continuously hitting enemies with primary fire freezes them for a short time.
raw.ability details:
* Freeze triggers when the enemy has been hit 21 times versus Damage and Support roles (1.05 seconds of continuous fire) and 46 times versus a Tank role (2.3 seconds of continuous fire).
* The counter resets if the enemy has not been hit for 0.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be frozen more than once without resetting the counter

raw.official description: Ice Wall's duration is increased by 2 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Increases max wall uptime from 42% to 58%.

raw.official description: Allies within Blizzard gain 25% increased movement speed and heal for 50 health per second.
raw.heal: 50 per second
raw.ability details: *Healing is only affected by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] if the drone passes through it. Area of effect healing alone is not amplified.

abilities.name: Cryo-Freeze

raw.heal: 62.5 per second
raw.duration:
0.44 seconds min. duration
4 seconds max. duration
0.24 seconds recovery
raw.ability details: * Restores 15 ammo per second (max. 60). * The cooldown starts only after the effect wears off. * The ability can be cancelled prematurely. * Mei becomes immune to damage and is cleared of all cleansable status effects. * Heals 250 health total, if not cancelled early. * The ice block behaves like a physical wall, and blocks line of sight for both enemies and allies. '"`UNIQ--ref-0000004B-QINU`"' ** This means healers will not be able to heal Mei until this expires. ** The ice block can block damaging abilities that require line of sight. For instance, a small ally or enemy could hide directly behind Mei's ice block to avoid D.Va's Self-Destruct. * Mei can be lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] (allied or enemy) while in Cryo-Freeze.

4 seconds max. duration
0.24 seconds recovery

abilities.name: Ice Wall

raw.official description: Create a wall in front of you.
raw.ability details: * Can be manually destroyed by pressing the ability key again, including while dead. * Before casting, the Ice Wall's placement from the player's line of sight can be toggled from perpendicular to parallel by pressing the hotkey again. * The cooldown starts immediately, not when the wall destroyed. * Ice Wall can be placed on [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] or [[payload]]. ** [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]], however, cannot be placed on top of Ice Wall. It will bounce off and deploy on ground. * Ability is stationed wherever it's placed. So, if placed on top of a temporary or moving surface, like Payload, it will remain in midair, even after the surface expires or moves. * [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] destroys any pillar of Ice Wall if placed on it, and will also prevent pillars from rising if Ice Wall is placed intersecting an existing tree. * Destroys fences and other breakables that collide with the pillars.

warnings: duration has multiple values; only the first number was parsed.

raw.official description: Double jumping creates a small ice pillar that launches Mei into the air.
raw.ability details: * Glacial Propulsion is not silenced or interrupted by [[hinder]]. It can be activated as long as Mei is airborne and less than 3 meters above ground. * The pillar is a terrain-like deployable similarly to [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]]. * The pillar shortly disappears afterwards, as Mei reaches the apex of the jump. * The pillar can launch Mei approximately up to 6.5 meters in the air, whereas you can only get 5.39 meters using ice wall and a jump.

[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect ''(blizzard)''
raw.official description: Launch a weather control drone that freezes enemies in a wide area.
raw.damage: 20 per second
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;spherical::armor piercing;;deployable effect::barrier piercing;;deployable::cleansable;;deployable::deployable;;invulnerable::stun;;deployable::travel time
raw.ability details: * Deals up to 85 damage over the duration. * The first tick results in a 50% progress towards the freeze (also inflicts a 50% slow effect), then it continues at a rate of 25% per second (also slows at a rate of 25% per second). (The slow effect is capped at 75%.) At 100% or higher freeze progress, the very next tick freezes the target; therefore, it takes about 2 seconds in order to freeze. ** This means that (using Blizzard alone), targets will only be frozen for 2.25 seconds. * Using [[Endothermic Blaster]]'s primary fire greatly speeds up the freezing process (and will allow targets to be frozen for a little more than 2.25 seconds). * The '''Area of Effect''' is based off line of sight from the deployed drone and blocked by terrain and terrain-like [[objects]], such as [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. ** Pierces [[barrier]]s, payloads, and [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]]. ** If [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] is placed on top of the drone at the center, the drone will be displaced. * The drone can be placed on and lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]]. * The projectile that deploys the drone acts as a standard barrier-piercing projectile. ** It can be absorbed by '''Negate Projectile''' abilities (such as [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]]) and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. ** If the projectile passes through [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]], all damage dealt by the ability will be amplified. * Once deployed by the projectile, the drone functions as an indestructible deployable (similar to [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]]), and cannot be negated or damaged. ** The only exception is Sombra's [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]], which destroys the deployable if hit.

damage.raw: 20 per second
